zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean I de Dol de Bretagne Seigneur de Dol, achevêque de Dol de Bretagne於大約1045年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉多爾-德-布利塔尼時，他的父親Rivallon II de Dinan, Seigneur de Dol32歲，母親Aremburge de Bréteuil17歲。他與Godehilde de Fougères結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1092年10月10日享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean I de Dol de Bretagne Seigneur de Dol, achevêque de Dol de Bretagne于大约1045年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉多爾-德-布利塔尼时，他的父亲Rivallon II de Dinan, Seigneur de Dol32岁，母亲Aremburge de Bréteuil17岁。他与Godehilde de Fougères结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1092年10月10日享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dol
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Dutch Adrianus, Cornelis, Hendrick, Pieter.
Shortened form of Flemish and Dutch   Van Mol  .

Dutch and Flemish: nickname from Middle Dutch mol ‘mole’, perhaps for a very short-sighted or blind person, or someone with dark hair, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a mole.

variants.name: Van Mol
meanings: Flemish and Dutch: habitational name for someone from Mol in Antwerp province, Belgium.

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean I de Dol de Bretagne Seigneur de Dol, achevêque de Dol de Bretagne was born about 1045, in Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, his father, Rivallon II de Dinan, Seigneur de Dol, was 32 and his mother, Aremburge de Bréteuil, was 17. He married Godehilde de Fougères. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 10 October 1092, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean I de Dol de Bretagne Seigneur de Dol, achevêque de Dol de Bretagne est né environ 1045, à Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Rivallon II de Dinan, Seigneur de Dol, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Aremburge de Bréteuil, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Godehilde de Fougères. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 10 octobre 1092, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean I de Dol de Bretagne Seigneur de Dol, achevêque de Dol de Bretagne um 1045 in Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rivallon II de Dinan, Seigneur de Dol 32 und seine Mutter Aremburge de Bréteuil 17. Er hat Godehilde de Fougères geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Oktober 1092 im Alter von 48 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean I de Dol de Bretagne Seigneur de Dol, achevêque de Dol de Bretagne è nato il circa 1045 nel Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Rivallon II de Dinan, Seigneur de Dol, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Aremburge de Bréteuil, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Godehilde de Fougères. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 10 ottobre 1092, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean I de Dol de Bretagne Seigneur de Dol, achevêque de Dol de Bretagneが約1045年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインドル-デ-ブレタグンで生まれた時，父Rivallon II de Dinan, Seigneur de Dolは32歳，母Aremburge de Bréteuilは17歳であった。Godehilde de Fougèresと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1092年10月10日に48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean I de Dol de Bretagne Seigneur de Dol, achevêque de Dol de Bretagne(이)가 대략 1045년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 도-데-브레타그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rivallon II de Dinan, Seigneur de Dol(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Aremburge de Bréteuil(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Godehilde de Fougères(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1092년 10월 10일 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean I de Dol de Bretagne Seigneur de Dol, achevêque de Dol de Bretagne nasceu aproximadamente 1045, em Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Rivallon II de Dinan, Seigneur de Dol, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Aremburge de Bréteuil, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Godehilde de Fougères. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de outubro de 1092, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean I de Dol de Bretagne Seigneur de Dol, achevêque de Dol de Bretagne родился около 1045 г. в местности дол-де-бретагн, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Rivallon II de Dinan, Seigneur de Dol было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Aremburge de Bréteuil, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Godehilde de Fougères. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 10 октября 1092 г. в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean I de Dol de Bretagne Seigneur de Dol, achevêque de Dol de Bretagne nació aproximadamente 1045, en Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Rivallon II de Dinan, Seigneur de Dol, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Aremburge de Bréteuil, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Godehilde de Fougères. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 10 de octubre de 1092, a la edad de 48 años.
